reference: My three-year-old urinated rusty or brown urine yesterday at two:forty-five PM. That was the last time he urinated until eight:forty-five AM this morning at school, which is not normal for him. Then, when his teacher contacted me, she said he urinated a lot, but the urine was yellow with tiny black specks in it. What could it be? He has no discomfort yet and no fever. Can you help me with this?
text: my three-year-old urinated rusty or brown urine yesterday at 2 45 pm that was the last time he urinated until 8 45 a.m this morning at school which is not normal for him then when his teacher contacted me she said he urinated a lot but the urine was yellow with tiny black specks in it what could it be he has no discomfort yet and no fever can you help me with this
